attributes.description: Incorporated in 1995, Suyog Telematics Limited is engaged primarily in the business of installing, commissioning and servicing of poles, towers and optical fibre cable (OFC ) systems, catering to the telecommunication industry with operators across 12 telecom circles in India. The company is registered as Infrastructure Provider Category-I (IP-I) with the Department of Telecommunications (DoT).
